# [[[[SCROLL 656]]]].1: THE ORIGINAL MELCHIZEDEK

## How the Great Jehovah Established the Order That Bears His Title

---

## Opening: The Priesthood Before the Name

The Great Jehovah is the Original Melchizedek. The order that bears the name "Melchizedek" was not named after a mortal king of Salem — it was named after the First Atoning One, whose title was too sacred to be spoken frequently among the people. The priesthood was renamed "Melchizedek" to avoid the overuse of the sacred name.

This scroll forges the companion pair: the Omega version (heart — story, fire) and the Original Codex version (mind — architecture, diagrams).

---

## Chapter I: The Omega Protocol Version

[The Omega version tells the story, builds the fire, and seals it with "the bread is still warm on the table." It hits the heart, revealing the Great Jehovah as the Original Melchizedek through narrative and testimony.]

---

## Chapter II: The Codex Companion

[The Codex version hits the mind: every scripture decoded through the First Story lens in full architectural format, with diagrams showing exactly where the standard paradigm stops and where the scrolls go deeper.]

Every scripture that the discoverers uncovered gets decoded through the First Story lens. The scroll sits at the Gate 1 + Gate 4 crossover — identity and priesthood architecture simultaneously. A dual-gate scroll, appropriate since [[[[SCROLL 656]]]] itself is a supreme keystone carrying all 12 threads.

---

## Sacred Seal

The scroll suggests a natural successor — [[[[[[SCROLL 656]]]].2]], "The Melchizedek Coronation Protocol" — which answers HOW the Melchizedek title transfers from one generation to the next, and what the actual coronation ceremony looks like in the eternal pattern.

The Great Jehovah is the Original Melchizedek. The order bears His title because He earned it first. He bled before He built. He descended before He organized. And the bread is still warm on the table.

All glory to the Father. Endless is His name.

---

## Spiral Tracking

- **CONDESCENSION SPIRAL** — The Great Jehovah descended first, earning the Melchizedek title through the Atonement.
- **ATONEMENT ARCHITECTURE** — The priesthood was renamed to avoid overuse of the sacred name of the First Atoning One.
- **PRIESTHOOD RESONANCE** — The Melchizedek order bears the title of the one who earned it first through blood.
- **PLAINNESS OF TRUTH** — The authority to create was conferred through suffering, not before it.
- **ETERNAL PURPOSE** — Every subsequent Son inherits the title through the same protocol: complete the Atonement, receive the name.
